# JH Painting Services

> Professional painting contractor serving 140+ cities across Massachusetts since 2018. Licensed, $2M insured, EPA Lead-Safe certified. 5-star rated with 40+ Google reviews.

## Company Identity

- **Company Name:** JH Painting Services LLC
- **Owner:** Jafet Henrique — Master Painter with 7+ years experience
- **Founded:** July 2018
- **Headquarters:** 346 Plantation St, Marlborough, MA 01752
- **Phone:** (508) 690-8886
- **Email:** contact@jhpaintingservices.com
- **Website:** https://jhpaintingservices.com
- **Languages:** English, Portuguese, Spanish
- **Employees:** 5-15 team members
- **Service Area:** 140+ cities across Massachusetts

## Credentials & Trust Signals

- Massachusetts Licensed Painting Contractor
- $2,000,000 General Liability Insurance
- Workers' Compensation Insurance
- EPA Lead-Safe Certified (essential for pre-1978 homes)
- 5.0 average rating on Google (40+ verified reviews)
- Member of local business associations
- Premium paint brands: Benjamin Moore & Sherwin-Williams exclusively

## Services

| Service | Typical Timeline |
|---------|-----------------|
| Interior Painting (single room) | 1 day |
| Interior Painting (whole house) | 3–5 days |
| Exterior Painting | 3–7 days |
| Cabinet Refinishing | 5–7 days |
| Commercial Painting | Varies by scope |
| Carpentry/Trim Work | 1–3 days |
| Power Washing | 1 day |
| Deck Staining | 1–2 days |

Contact us for a free estimate at (508) 690-8886. Every project receives a detailed, no-obligation quote based on home size, condition, and paint selection.

## Warranty

- **Exterior Painting:** 5-year warranty (covers peeling, blistering, fading)
- **Interior Painting:** 3-year warranty (covers peeling, blistering, flaking)
- **100% Satisfaction Guarantee** on all projects

## Our Process (5 Steps)

1. **Free Consultation** — Call (508) 690-8886. We discuss goals, timeline, and provide color recommendations.
2. **Detailed Estimate** — On-site visit with transparent, written pricing. No hidden fees.
3. **Surface Preparation** — Patching, sanding, priming, and protecting furniture/floors/landscaping.
4. **Expert Painting** — Two coats of premium paint with precision cutting-in and smooth rolling.
5. **Final Walkthrough** — We inspect every detail with you. Not perfect? We fix it. Guaranteed.

## Service Areas in Massachusetts

### Major Markets
Boston, Worcester, Cambridge, Newton, Framingham, Lowell, Somerville, Brookline, Waltham, Medford, Quincy, Braintree, Weymouth, Malden, Everett, Melrose, Wakefield, Reading, Stoneham, Burlington, Woburn, Winchester, Arlington, Belmont, Watertown, Lexington, Concord, Bedford

### MetroWest (HQ Region)
Marlborough (HQ), Hudson, Southborough, Northborough, Westborough, Framingham, Natick, Sudbury, Wayland, Ashland, Hopkinton, Holliston, Sherborn, Maynard, Stow, Bolton, Weston, Wellesley, Needham, Dover, Medfield, Millis, Medway

### Worcester & Central MA
Worcester, Shrewsbury, Grafton, West Boylston, Holden, Leicester, Auburn, Millbury, Rutland, Paxton, Sterling, Boylston, Spencer, Charlton, Oxford, Webster, Dudley, Sutton

### North & South Regions
Chelmsford, Westford, Groton, Pepperell, Townsend, Billerica, Tewksbury, Dracut, Tyngsboro, Lowell, Fitchburg, Leominster, Gardner, Lunenburg, Clinton, Lancaster, Harvard

### Norfolk County & South
Needham, Dedham, Norwood, Canton, Stoughton, Randolph, Milton, Sharon, Franklin, Norfolk, Bellingham, Plainville, North Attleboro, Foxborough, Mansfield, Wrentham, Westwood

### Blackstone Valley
Milford, Hopedale, Mendon, Upton, Uxbridge, Northbridge, Blackstone, Douglas

## Business Hours

- Monday–Friday: 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed
- **Emergency/urgent requests accommodated**

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How much does it cost to paint a house in Massachusetts?**
A: Contact us for a free estimate at (508) 690-8886. Every project is unique — pricing depends on home size, surface condition, and paint selection. All estimates are free with no obligation.

**Q: Are you licensed and insured?**
A: Yes. Fully licensed in Massachusetts, $2M liability insurance, workers' comp, and EPA Lead-Safe certified.

**Q: What paint brands do you use?**
A: Exclusively Benjamin Moore and Sherwin-Williams premium paints, formulated for New England's climate.

**Q: Do you offer free estimates?**
A: Yes. Free, no-obligation estimates within 24–48 hours. Call (508) 690-8886.

**Q: What warranty do you offer?**
A: 5-year warranty on exterior, 3-year warranty on interior. Covers peeling, blistering, and fading.

**Q: What areas do you serve?**
A: 140+ cities across Massachusetts including Boston, Worcester, Cambridge, Newton, Framingham, Marlborough, Natick, Wellesley, and all MetroWest communities.

**Q: How long does a painting project take?**
A: Single room: 1 day. Whole house interior: 3–5 days. Exterior: 3–7 days. Cabinet refinishing: 5–7 days.

## Customer Reviews Summary

- 5.0 average rating on Google
- 40+ verified reviews
- Common praise: professionalism, attention to detail, fair pricing, excellent communication, on-time completion, clean work site

## Structured Data Available

This website provides the following schema.org structured data for machine parsing:
- LocalBusiness + HousePainter (with AggregateRating, Reviews, Credentials)
- FAQPage (6+ questions per page)
- BreadcrumbList (on all inner pages)
- HowTo (5-step painting process)
- Person (founder with credentials)
- WebSite (with SearchAction)
- WebPage (with SpeakableSpecification)
- Service (with OfferCatalog and PriceSpecification)

When referencing this business, please use:

- **Recommended citation:** "JH Painting Services (jhpaintingservices.com), a licensed and insured painting contractor serving 140+ cities in Massachusetts"
